label: Continual & online learning

node.label: Continual & online learning
node.definition: Models update over a stream while balancing plasticity, stability, and catastrophic forgetting.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Continual & online learning is to connect Sequences, events & time series, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data to downstream capabilities including Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines, Procedural memory & skills.
examples: substrate for Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Sequences, events & time series, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.

dependencies.rationale: Continual & online learning uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Models update over a stream while balancing plasticity, stability, and catastrophic forgetting.
